heading: Transferred
label: 1274 to 1274i Transferred
notes: CodificationSections 1274 to 1274i of this title were transferred to section 1351 et seq. of Title 22, Foreign Relations and Intercourse, and were subsequently omitted from the Code.Section 1274, , , related to suspension and termination of agreement in case of discrimination, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50160 Stat. 155section 1351 of Title 22Section 1274a, , , related to suspension of title I of act , and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50260 Stat. 155section 1352 of Title 22Apr. 30, 1946Section 1274b, , , related to customs duties on importations from Philippines, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50360 Stat. 156section 1353 of Title 22Section 1274c, , , related to quotas on Philippine articles, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50460 Stat. 156section 1354 of Title 22Section 1274d, , , related to suspension of processing tax on coconut oil, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 505(b)60 Stat. 157section 1355 of Title 22Section 1274e, , , related to termination of payments into Philippine treasury, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 506(a)60 Stat. 157section 1356 of Title 22Section 1274f, , , related to trade agreements with the Philippines, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50860 Stat. 158section 1357 of Title 22Section 1274g, , , related to rights of third countries, and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 50960 Stat. 158section 1358 of Title 22Section 1274h, , , related to administration of title I of act , and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title V, § 51060 Stat. 158section 1359 of Title 22Apr. 30, 1946Section 1274i, , , related to definitions of terms used in act , and was transferred to .act Apr. 30, 1946, ch. 244, title I, § 260 Stat. 141section 1360 of Title 22Apr. 30, 1946
